creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #27)

Two commits preserve tree history and it's already in my tree, and in use here, locally, for months.

I see Li-Wen has approved the patch on March 3. But that was in the context of a -legacy port. The legacy port is no longer viable because of its dependency on botan2. Let's wait for Li-Wen. He uses a plugin that is only supported by 2.7.6. Though, I don't know how we can salvage 2.7.6 (as -legacy) given it's deprecated now. We have plenty of time before we absolutely have to push these commits. Let's wait two weeks.
